content_brief.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds
content_brief.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99.
content_outline: The Real Reason Landlords Withhold Security Deposits (And Why They Get Away With It)
Tenant Rights 101: Return Deadlines, Deductible Damages, and Normal Wear & Tear
How a Security Deposit Demand Letter Forces Action (Without a Lawyer)
Step-by-Step: Writing and Sending Your Letter in 60 Seconds
key_points: Most U.S. states require landlords to return security deposits within 14–30 days and provide an itemized deduction list
Normal wear and tear, such as minor scuffs and faded paint, is not legally deductible from your deposit
A formal demand letter is often the fastest, cheapest way to recover a withheld deposit before escalating to small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription
content_brief.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Generate your deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no sign-up or subscription required.
content_brief.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting from their security deposits
